name: LoanMax Title Loans
description_short: Columbia Heights, MN's LoanMax Title Loans at 4911 Central Ave NE offers fast title loans and payday advances with same-day approval.
description_long:
LoanMax Title Loans in Columbia Heights, MN is located at 4911 Central Ave NE, a convenient storefront for residents of this northeastern Minneapolis suburb. This standalone location is open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM, Saturday 9 AM to 2 PM, and closed Sundays. The Central Avenue location makes it easy for Columbia Heights residents to access cash services without traveling far.

At this Columbia Heights location, LoanMax Title Loans provides title loans, payday loans, and cash advances to qualifying borrowers. The staff can explain loan terms, rates, and eligibility requirements during your visit. For questions about your options or to learn more before coming in, call (763) 299-4740 during business hours.

If you're a Columbia Heights resident facing an unexpected expense or need cash between paychecks, LoanMax Title Loans can help. Bring a valid photo ID, proof of income, and your vehicle title (if applying for a title loan) to speed up the approval process. Same-day funding is available for qualified applications.
address: 4911 Central Ave NE, Columbia Heights, MN 55421

company_info.headquarters: 4911 Central Ave NE, Columbia Heights, MN 55421

pros: Established company with 25+ years of operating history since 1990
Multiple Michigan locations (5+ nearby branches) for convenience
Quick loan process requiring only vehicle, ID, and clear title
Accepts multiple payment methods: cash, check, debit card, Western Union
Loans up to $10,000 available for larger emergencies
Transparent about state licensing and regulatory compliance across multiple states
Published complaint procedures and regulatory agency contact information available on site
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee information disclosed on website—critical pricing opacity
Title loan model creates risk of vehicle repossession if payments are missed
No mention of alternative financial products or credit counseling resources
Typical title loan terms (not disclosed) often result in debt traps and high-cost repeat borrowing
Limited accessibility of loan terms and conditions before in-person application
best_for: Consumers with genuine short-term emergencies who have reliable income and can repay quickly
Vehicle owners with significant equity who cannot access traditional personal loans due to credit issues
Borrowers who need cash within hours or same day and have exhausted other options
diagnosis: LoanMax Title Loans is appropriate only for consumers facing genuine short-term financial emergencies who own a vehicle with equity and have reliable means to repay within weeks or months. The critical caveat: title loans are high-cost debt instruments with undisclosed rates often exceeding 100% APR and carry the risk of vehicle repossession; this should be a last resort after exploring personal loans, credit union PALs, or credit counseling.
services: Payment acceptance via cash, check, debit card, and Western Union
meta_description: Columbia Heights LoanMax Title Loans at 4911 Central Ave NE, MN – fast payday and title loans.
